sprint_plans.title: string
sprint_plans.active_sprint_week: number (1-based position of the active sprint within this plan, e.g. 1 for the first sprint of this plan) or null
sprint_plans.sprint_start_date: YYYY-MM-DD (start date of the active sprint week) or null
sprint_plans.total_weeks_in_plan: number (total sprint weeks in this plan) or null
